steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is behavioral economists (plural). The intervening phrase "such as Gee, whose research focuses on charitable giving" is a parenthetical — strip it out and the structure reads: "behavioral economists ______ that..."

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
A plural subject takes a base-form (no -s) verb in present tense.

A) has contended — singular present-perfect; disagrees with plural subject. Wrong.
B) contends — singular present (-s form); disagrees with plural subject. Wrong.
C) is contending — singular present-progressive; disagrees with plural subject. Wrong.
D) contend — plural base form; correctly agrees with "behavioral economists." Correct.

D is correct.
